name: Go (go.dev)
description: Installs Go and the tools needed by the VS Code Go extension, including golangci-lint. Go is installed directly from the official Go distribution, rather than using a package manager.

version.description: Select or enter a Go version to install

extraPackages.description: Extra Go tools to install, separated by spaces. For example: 'golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports google.golang.org/protobuf/cmd/protoc-gen-go'.
